##OWNER=Harvard
##SOURCE=Mineralogical Museum, Harvard University
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless granular massive, and as rhombohedra in cavities, associated with white rice-shaped fluorapatite, and colorless quartz. Type sample.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
